sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_instance"><sp_instance action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><advanced_placeholder_dimensions>false</advanced_placeholder_dimensions><async_load>false</async_load><async_load_device_type>desktop,tablet,mobile</async_load_device_type><async_load_trigger>viewport</async_load_trigger><class_name/><color>default</color><css/><glyph/><id/><order>1</order><placeholder_dimensions>{	"mobile": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"desktop": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"tablet": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	}}</placeholder_dimensions><placeholder_dimensions_script><![CDATA[function evaluateConfig(options) { return {	"mobile": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"desktop": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"tablet": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	}}; }]]></placeholder_dimensions_script><placeholder_template><!-- 
	AngularJS template with configurable options.
	Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior.
	Example: Display an element when max row count is 10:
	<div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div>
	The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders.
-->
	<div class="skeleton-container">
	<!-- Header Skeleton -->
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div>
	<!-- Body Skeleton -->
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div>
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div>
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div>
</div></placeholder_template><preserve_placeholder_size>false</preserve_placeholder_size><roles/><short_description/><size>md</size><sp_column display_value="1">49518a56939d0b90945375dcebba1089</sp_column><sp_widget display_value="Topic Content">9c691d40c31030102ec1a589a840dd4c</sp_widget><sys_class_name>sp_instance</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 03:36:28</sys_created_on><sys_id>637bdede93914b90945375dcebba1006</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Explore our full range of tools and services</sys_name><sys_package display_value="msdportal" source="x_146833_msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_instance_637bdede93914b90945375dcebba1006</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 03:38:04</sys_updated_on><title>Explore our full range of tools and services</title><url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{
	"limit": {
		"value": "12",
		"displayValue": "12"
	},
	"sortby": {
		"value": "popularity",
		"displayValue": "popularity"
	},
	"search_application": {
		"value": "",

	},
	"search_sources_filter": {
		"value": "d43f158dc30101103f4fcd7b7940dde8",
		"displayValue": "All Knowledge Articles"
	},
	"show_global_redirect": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"content_displayed_from": {
		"value": "Current topic and all child topics",
		"displayValue": "Current topic and all child topics"
	},
	"title": {
		"value": "Explore our full range of tools and services",
		"displayValue": "Explore our full range of tools and services"
	},
	"show_empty_state": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"title_heading_level": {
		"value": "h3",
		"displayValue": "H3"
	}
}]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=637bdede93914b90945375dcebba1006"/></record_update>
